name: Broccoli Cheese Bake
recipeIngredient: 10 oz frozen chopped broccoli, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Assemble the food grinder with a coarse grinding plate.
2. Turn to speed 4 and grind broccoli and onion. Set aside.
3. Assemble the rotor slicer/shredder with a fine shredding cone (no 1).
4. Turn to speed 4 and shred cheese. Set aside.
5. Sift flour, salt, and baking powder into a bowl.
6. Add milk, eggs, and butter to the bowl.
7. Attach the bowl to the flat beater.
8. Turn to speed 2 and mix for 1 minute.
9. Add the broccoli mixture and cheese.
10. Turn to speed 2 and mix for 30 seconds.
11. Pour the mixture into a greased 9x9x1 1/2-inch pan.
12. Bake at 375°F for 60 to 75 minutes.
13. Cut into 3-inch squares to serve.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
